include("${CMAKE_CURRENT_LIST_DIR}/../../../cmake/bbtool.cmake")

bb_embed_site(
    OUT_SRCS _site_srcs
    TABLE demo_site
    DIST_DIR "${CMAKE_CURRENT_LIST_DIR}/demo_site"
)

# DI DEMOLITION (composition migration, KB decision #735): smoke's
# composition root is now generated by `bbtool codegen` from `//
# bbtool:init` markers (see `make smoke-codegen`), mirroring
# examples/floor's `make floor-codegen` proof. The generated
# bb_app_init.c is gitignored (decision #725, build artifact, never
# committed) and absent by default -- entry_espidf.c calls
# bb_app_init_early()/bb_app_init(), so unlike floor's proof-only wiring,
# a plain `pio run -d examples/smoke` now REQUIRES `make smoke-codegen`
# (or an equivalent prior `bbtool codegen` invocation) to have run first.
set(BB_SMOKE_GENERATED_APP_INIT "${CMAKE_CURRENT_LIST_DIR}/generated/bb_app_init.c")
set(_smoke_srcs "entry_espidf.c" "smoke_app.c" "storage_typed_selftest.c" ${_site_srcs})
if(EXISTS "${BB_SMOKE_GENERATED_APP_INIT}")
    list(APPEND _smoke_srcs "generated/bb_app_init.c")
endif()

# B1-747: the REQUIRES closure is now resolved ONCE, authoritatively, by
# `bbtool codegen --board <id>` from the [capability.smoke]/[board.*]
# manifest in bbtool.toml (see scripts/bbtool/boards.py +
# scripts/bbtool/commands/codegen.py) -- no hand-written SMOKE_REQUIRES list
# and no additive union survive; this is the SOLE source of REQUIRES.
#
# The fragment is board-specific (display/power/fan groups differ per
# board), and the generated dir is gitignored -- a stale fragment from a
# DIFFERENT board's prior `make smoke-gen-*` run would otherwise silently
# link the wrong closure. `BB_AUTOWIRE_BOARD` (also emitted by codegen) is
# the stale-fragment guard: hard FATAL_ERROR, never a silent skip, if the
# fragment is missing or was resolved for a different board than the one
# actually being built.
include("${CMAKE_CURRENT_LIST_DIR}/../../../cmake/bb_generated.cmake")
bb_include_generated_or_fail(BB_SMOKE_GENERATED_FRAGMENT
    "${CMAKE_CURRENT_LIST_DIR}/generated/bb_autowire_components.cmake"
    "smoke: run `make smoke-gen-<board>` (see the Makefile) before building.")
# ESP-IDF evaluates this file TWICE: once in a REQUIRES-only early-expansion
# pass (CMAKE_BUILD_EARLY_EXPANSION) that only guarantees idf_component_
# register()'s own REQUIRES/PRIV_REQUIRES args -- externally -D'd cache
# variables like FIRMWARE_BOARD (set via board_build.cmake_extra_args) are
# NOT yet populated there, so this guard only makes sense on the real pass.
if(NOT CMAKE_BUILD_EARLY_EXPANSION)
    if(NOT DEFINED BB_AUTOWIRE_BOARD OR NOT BB_AUTOWIRE_BOARD STREQUAL FIRMWARE_BOARD)
        message(FATAL_ERROR
            "smoke: stale generated/bb_autowire_components.cmake -- resolved for "
            "board '${BB_AUTOWIRE_BOARD}' but building FIRMWARE_BOARD "
            "'${FIRMWARE_BOARD}'. Run the matching `make smoke-gen-<board>` "
            "target (see the Makefile) before building this board.")
    endif()
endif()

idf_component_register(
    SRCS ${_smoke_srcs}
    INCLUDE_DIRS "." "../include"
    REQUIRES ${BB_AUTOWIRE_REQUIRES})
